subject: MLK Weekend Visit
snippet: Hey Kris! Booking my flight for MLK weekend.
body: Hey Kris. I went ahead and booked my flight. Getting into Memphis International on Saturday January 17 at 11:15 AM on Delta. Coming back Monday the 19th afternoon. Can you pick me up from the airport? I know Mama will be excited. Was thinking we could do the MLK community service thing at Grace Tabernacle on the 18th like we used to do with Dad. Let me know what you need me to bring. Tell Jaylen uncle Will said hey. Love you sis. - Will

subject: Thanksgiving Game Plan
snippet: Girl lets figure out Thanksgiving before it sneaks up on us.
body: Kris. I know Thanksgiving is four weeks out but you know how we do - if we don't plan now we will be at Kroger at 11pm the night before fighting over the last can of cranberry sauce. Are we doing it at your place again? I can bring the greens and mac and cheese. Is Miss Loretta coming to you or are you picking her up? Also Jaylen has a game on the 25th right? We need to time the cooking around that. Let me know and I will start my grocery list. Love T

subject: Re: Thanksgiving Game Plan
snippet: Yes my house. Picking up Mama that morning. Jaylen game is the 25th at 5 PM.
body: T. Yes lets do my house again. I will pick up Mama Wednesday morning so she can spend the night. Jaylen has an away game on the 25th at 5 PM in Germantown so we need to eat by 3 at the latest so I can get him there. I will do the turkey and dressing and sweet potatoes and cobbler. You bring greens and mac and cheese and rolls. I am going to do a Kroger run that Saturday before. Budget is tight but I think $120 should cover both households if we plan smart. Can you check if that cranberry relish recipe from last year is still in your phone? Love K

subject: JV Basketball Season Information
snippet: 2026-27 JV Basketball season details and parent expectations.
body: Dear Parents and Guardians. Welcome to the 2026-27 JV Basketball season. Attached you will find the complete season schedule game locations and team expectations. Key dates: Season opener November 9 vs Bartlett at home 6 PM. Team travel meals fund $200 due November 1. Permission forms required for all away games. Players must maintain a 2.5 GPA to remain eligible. Practice schedule: Mon/Wed/Fri 3:30-5:30 PM. Please join our parent Discord server for real-time updates. Go Wildcats! Coach Darius Turner

subject: Re: MLK Weekend Visit
snippet: Can't wait! I'll be there. One thing though.
body: Will! So glad you are coming. I will absolutely pick you up. 11:15 AM Delta - got it. Yes the MLK service project at Grace Tabernacle is happening on the 18th. Pastor Owens already asked if we could help with the food drive setup. Mama is going to cry when she sees you - you know how she gets. Guest room will be ready. Jaylen has been asking about you. One thing - I have a deaconess board meeting that Saturday morning at 10 that might run until 12:30. Your flight gets in at 11:15 so let me figure out the timing. Might need to slip out of the meeting early. Love K

subject: Christmas Plans
snippet: Hey Kristen - checking in about Christmas.
body: Hey Kristen. Wanted to check in about Christmas plans. I would love to FaceTime you and Miss Loretta and Jaylen on Christmas morning around 10 AM if that works. I know it is not the same as being there but Nashville traffic on the holidays is brutal. I will ship the ham before Christmas so you still have it. I know it is still early but the holidays always sneak up. How is Jaylen doing? I saw on Instagram he made JV basketball - Marcus would have been so proud. Give Miss Loretta my love. Talk soon. - Denise

subject: Re: Christmas Plans
snippet: 10 AM FaceTime works perfectly!
body: Denise! 10 AM FaceTime on Christmas morning is perfect. We will have Mama here by then and Jaylen will be up. Thank you for shipping the ham that is one less thing I have to figure out. Jaylen is doing great - first game is November 9. I wish Marcus could see him out there. I am going to do Christmas morning at my house and then take Mama back to her place that evening. Will is coming for MLK weekend in January too so we will have a full house that month. Love K

subject: Tithing Records Question
snippet: Sister Moore - quick question about your giving.
body: Sister Moore. I am reconciling our church records for the year and wanted to check something. Our records show your total giving through September as $3750. I know you mentioned you set up automatic payments through our Stripe portal. Can you verify this matches your records? Sometimes the online system and our books get out of sync. I want to make sure we have it right before year-end statements go out. God bless. Brother James Tate - Church Treasurer

subject: Re: Tithing Records Question
snippet: Brother Tate I will pull my records and get back to you.
body: Brother Tate. Thank you for checking. I pay through the Stripe portal every first and third Sunday. My notebook shows I have been paying $200 per pay period but I think some months I did $175. Let me pull my bank statements and get you an exact number. I also made a $50 Valentine offering in February - not sure if that shows as tithe or offering in your system. I will get back to you this week. Blessings. Kristen
